backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend canister with CRUD operations for timetable slots, tasks, chat messages, sidebar items, and day entries, using in-memory Maps and auto-incrementing IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of a four-metric statistics summary panel in DayTracker.tsx, with test ID REQ-55 and high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AcadMind app with PWA meta tags, manifest link, theme color, Apple touch icon, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for AcadMind specifying app name, icons, theme color, display mode, and categories for education and productivity.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategy for static assets with background cache updates, skipping ICP canister API calls, and providing an offline fallback for navigation requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider and UserProvider, registers the service worker in production, and renders the Toaster and InstallBanner.
frontend/src/components/InstallBanner.ts: PWA install prompt banner component that listens for the beforeinstallprompt event, shows an install/dismiss UI at the bottom of the screen, and persists dismissal to localStorage.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a responsive sidebar, mobile header with hamburger menu, theme toggle, page content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Renders the navigation sidebar with links to all app routes, active-state highlighting, and a user profile button that opens the UserProfileModal.
frontend/src/components/TaskModal.tsx: A dialog modal for adding or editing a task, with fields for title, due date, and description, including validation and async save handling.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes, with a tooltip indicating the current mode.
frontend/src/components/TimetableSlotMod: A dialog modal for adding or editing a weekly timetable slot, with fields for subject, day, start time, duration, and location.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileModal: A dialog modal for setting or updating the user's name/email and optional Gemini API key, with save and sign-out actions stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/UserContext.tsx: Provides a React context for managing and persisting the user's ID and Gemini API key in localStorage, with update and clear helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines localStorage-backed data types and React Query hooks for managing tasks, timetable slots, and day entries per user. Provides CRUD mutations and queries that read/write to localStorage with user-scoped keys.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a teal/slate-green light and dark theme. Also includes a utility class for thin scrollbars.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using `clsx` and `tailwind-merge`.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/Assignments.tsx: Task management page that displays, filters, creates, edits, and deletes tasks stored via React Query hooks. Supports pending/completed filtering, due-date badges, and confirmation dialogs for deletion.
frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx: AI chat page that sends user messages to the Gemini API with timetable and task context, displaying a conversation thread with typing indicators and markdown-style bold rendering. Requires a Gemini API key from user context.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Overview dashboard showing today's timetable slots, upcoming tasks, task statistics, and quick-action buttons for navigation. Fetches slots and tasks via React Query hooks and displays skeleton loaders while loading.
frontend/src/pages/DayTracker.tsx: A day-tracking page that lets users log, edit, and delete daily study/work hour entries, with a stats panel showing all-time, weekly, and today's hours/minutes, and a weekly calendar view for navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Guide.tsx: A static help/guide page that documents each major feature of the app (Dashboard, AI Chat, Timetable, etc.) with step-by-step instructions, tips, and relevant links.
frontend/src/pages/TimetableManual.tsx: A manual timetable management page where users can add, edit, and delete class slots organized by day of the week, using a modal form and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/TimetableUpload.tsx: An OCR-based timetable upload page that accepts a dragged or selected image, simulates extraction (currently shows a 'Coming Soon' state), and allows saving parsed slots to the timetable.
frontend/src/utils/geminiChat.ts: Utility that builds a personalized system prompt from the user's timetable slots and tasks, then calls the Gemini API with conversation history to return an AI-generated response.
frontend/src/utils/mockAi.ts: A rule-based mock AI response generator that returns canned replies about schedules, tasks, study tips, or greetings based on keyword matching in the user's message.
frontend/src/utils/mockOcr.ts: Provides a mock OCR utility that simulates timetable extraction from a file by returning randomly generated schedule slots after a delay. Also exports a helper to convert 'HH:MM' time strings to minutes since midnight.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the design system tokens including custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), typography fonts (Inter, Plus Jakarta Sans), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 41) for a student academic management PWA, documenting its core modules, architectural decisions, known issues (e.g., broken Gemini chat routing via ICP canister), and existing implemented features.
